sounds.title: Battle exchange
sounds.trigger: attackRound() — each dice exchange, human and AI battles alike
sounds.prompt: Three sharp bolt-action rifle shots in quick succession with a dry battlefield echo

sounds.title: Battle blitz
sounds.trigger: attack() — blitz rolls the battle to the end
sounds.prompt: Sustained overlapping bolt-action rifle volleys, then a heavy machine gun burst

sounds.title: Territory conquered
sounds.trigger: BattleResult.conquered — territory taken
sounds.prompt: A short triumphant brass fanfare stab with a quick snare drum flourish, battle won, victorious

sounds.title: Pull back
sounds.trigger: pullBack() — attacker breaks off the battle
sounds.prompt: A solo bugle plays a short descending retreat call, then boots hurry away on dirt

sounds.title: Faction eliminated
sounds.trigger: BattleResult.eliminatedFaction — a power leaves the war
sounds.prompt: A single deep bass drum hit, then a low male choir hum fading to silence

sounds.title: Reinforcement placed
sounds.trigger: placeReinforcement() — every troop placed, including auto-place steps
sounds.prompt: One pair of boots snapping to attention on packed earth, single crisp one-shot

sounds.title: Card drawn
sounds.trigger: drawCard() — end of a conquering turn
sounds.prompt: A single playing card slides off a deck and snaps onto a wooden table

sounds.title: Card set traded
sounds.trigger: tradeCards() — a set traded for reinforcements
sounds.prompt: A rubber stamp strikes paper twice, then a small brass coin rings on a wooden desk

sounds.title: Fortify march
sounds.trigger: fortify() — overland troop movement
sounds.prompt: A column of soldiers marching in step on a dirt road, rhythmic boots

sounds.title: Convoy embarks
sounds.trigger: embark() — troops set sail on the Salonica–İzmir lane
sounds.prompt: A very distant steam ship horn blast in a harbor over seagulls and lapping water

sounds.title: Convoy lands
sounds.trigger: landConvoys() — troops come ashore
sounds.prompt: A wooden boat scrapes onto a shingle beach, then boots splash through shallow water

sounds.title: Your turn
sounds.trigger: startTurn() — the human seat comes up
sounds.prompt: A small desk bell dings

sounds.title: Phase change
sounds.trigger: endPhase() — reinforce → attack → fortify
sounds.prompt: A single soft muted snare drum tap, short and dry

sounds.title: Card stinger — celebratory
sounds.trigger: EventCard opens with mood=celebratory (congresses, TBMM, Mudanya, Sultanate…)
sounds.prompt: A large festival bass drum pounding a fast celebratory rhythm over a crowd erupting in cheers

sounds.title: Card stinger — triumphant
sounds.trigger: EventCard opens with mood=triumphant (İnönü, Sakarya, Great Offensive)
sounds.prompt: A distant artillery salvo, then a triumphant brass fanfare with snare drums

sounds.title: Card stinger — dramatic
sounds.trigger: EventCard opens with mood=dramatic (İstanbul occupied, Sèvres, revolts, Greek offensive)
sounds.prompt: Two low ominous drum hits over a rising tense string tremolo

sounds.title: Card stinger — somber
sounds.trigger: EventCard opens with mood=somber (Mübadele, Greek collapse, Mosul)
sounds.prompt: A solo ney flute plays a slow mournful phrase over a low drone

sounds.title: Card stinger — diplomatic
sounds.trigger: EventCard opens with mood=diplomatic (treaties, Soviet aid, political shifts)
sounds.prompt: A telegraph key clatters a message, then a wax seal stamps onto paper

sounds.title: Decision card
sounds.trigger: pendingDecision — Tekâlif-i Milliye, Lausanne terms
sounds.prompt: An urgent telegraph clatter with morse code

sounds.title: Allied landings
sounds.trigger: runLandings() — Allied troops put ashore after terms are refused
sounds.prompt: Naval gun salvos from warships offshore, then an alarm bell rings

sounds.title: Territory select
sounds.trigger: onTerritoryClick on an own territory
sounds.prompt: A soft wooden tap on a paper map, tiny and subtle

sounds.title: UI click
sounds.trigger: Buttons — HUD, dialogs, settings
sounds.prompt: A quiet tight mechanical click of a small brass button, single

sounds.title: Game start
sounds.trigger: IntroScreen → onBegin
sounds.prompt: A deep field drum roll builds, then a shrill reedy folk pipe call rises over it

sounds.title: Menu ambient loop
sounds.trigger: IntroScreen background loop
sounds.prompt: Wind blowing over an open steppe with a faint distant drum every few seconds, calm ambience

sounds.title: Ending — Mutlak Zafer (total conquest)
sounds.trigger: overlay.total — nothing on the map is not yours
sounds.prompt: Massive victory fanfare for a historical war strategy game: full military band with davul and zurna over triumphant brass, massed drums, maximal and overwhelming, ends on a huge resolved major chord. 100 BPM, in D major, instrumental only

sounds.title: Ending — beyond the Pact
sounds.trigger: overlay.beyond — victory plus annexations carried to Lausanne
sounds.prompt: Grand imperial victory fanfare: triumphant brass with davul drums, weighty and powerful with a stern edge, projecting dominance, resolved ending. 100 BPM, in D major, instrumental only

sounds.title: Ending — Misak-ı Millî achieved
sounds.trigger: overlay.victory — the intended win
sounds.prompt: Proud victory jingle for a war of independence won: warm brass swell into davul and zurna celebration, heartfelt and noble, resolved major cadence. 100 BPM, in D major, instrumental only

sounds.title: Ending — Lausanne, honorable
sounds.trigger: overlay.lausanne.near — settled at the table, 27+/30 held
sounds.prompt: Dignified diplomatic resolution jingle: hymn-like brass phrase, calm snare, ends on a stable major cadence with one bittersweet note. 90 BPM, in D major, instrumental only

sounds.title: Ending — Lausanne, compromised
sounds.trigger: overlay.lausanne.partial — settled with half the homeland
sounds.prompt: Ambivalent ending jingle: solo ney flute lead over sparse frame drums, unresolved suspended cadence, neither victory nor defeat. 80 BPM, in D minor, instrumental only

sounds.title: Ending — Lausanne, dictated
sounds.trigger: overlay.lausanne.poor — settled having recovered little
sounds.prompt: Hollow defeat jingle: low drone, slow funeral bass drum, thin distant ney flute fading, unresolved minor ending. 70 BPM, in D minor, instrumental only

sounds.title: Ending — defeat
sounds.trigger: overlay.defeat — Turkey eliminated from the map
sounds.prompt: Somber lament for a lost war: solo ney flute over low strings, slow funeral drum, grief-stricken, fading to silence. 70 BPM, in D minor, instrumental only
